MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. CROSS DEFENDANT MOUNIR KARDOSH'S DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT IS Transferred to Department 501, the Housing/Real Property Court, to be heard on August 16, 2013. See Local Rule 8.10. The moving party shall provide courtesy copies of the operative Cross-Complaint per Local Rule 2.6C to Department 501, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than July 15, 2013 at 4 pm. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.
